text:
Once upon an autumn afternoon. There was a wise old owl named Oddusdy Owlmoisterskin.

Oddusdy lived high in an old oak tree. He loved to read books.

One afternoon, he found a wonderful book about dragons.

He loved dragons.

One night, Oddusdy went snooping.

He discovered a secret laboratory.

He stole potions!

He flew home fast.

One day, he got clumsy.

Some stuff hit him!

He knew no pain.

But his book had secrets!

Maybe that's why.

Now he likes reading alone.
She found him!<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
